reach_why: Extends familiar ideas on paradigms, underdetermination, and model-dependent simplicity rather than opening wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links reframing scarcity, framework-relative simplicity, and meaningless strings to critique combinatorial search models.
falsifiable_why: Mostly philosophical and meta-explanatory; only weakly testable via comparative studies of reframing versus brute-search explanation.
explanation: Explanation depends on finding the right framework, not minimizing assumptions or counting possible word sequences.
